stock_market.summary: Late session trends show stabilizing energy prices. Markets are closing the month with a defensive posture as investors digest the end-of-quarter volatility and prepare for April’s economic calendar.

key_metrics.impact: Energy price sensitivity, anticipation of new month data

art_market.summary: March 2026 wrap-up: Strong demand for contemporary blue-chip works continues to drive auction house performance. Market sentiment remains positive, with a clear trend toward high-quality assets in uncertain economic conditions.

key_metrics.major_events: Strong close for March auctions, consistent blue-chip demand
